rationale: Item 19 provides historical AUV data for 2,581 franchised restaurants that operated for the full fiscal year 2025. The royalty rate used in the FPR population is the standard 6% rate that applies to all franchisees. Item 6 confirms the standard royalty is 6% for current new franchisees. While various incentive programs may reduce the effective royalty for new franchisees in the early years (e.g., Standard Incentive provides $125K credit, Strategic provides $175K), the FPR population consists of restaurants that have operated for an average of 14 years — well past any incentive periods. The AUV data represents gross sales, not net-of-royalty figures, so the royalty rate does not affect the comparability of the AUV metric itself. There is no cohort comparability discrepancy.
